corporator.note: Common transliteration in Kannada media; alternative 'ಪಾಲಿಕೆ ಸದಸ್ಯ' (corporation member) is more literal but less used colloquially — confirm with a native-speaker reviewer.

report card.note: Not a literal translation of 'report card' — this is the term for the candidate summary page (architecture §9).

voter ID.note: Also commonly seen as transliterated 'ವೋಟರ್ ಐಡಿ' in casual usage — confirm which form citizens recognize faster.

Bengaluru Central.note: 'ಕೇಂದ್ರ' (center) vs 'ಮಧ್ಯ' (middle) — confirm which reads as the official corporation name in Kannada.

INC.note: Kannada media refers to the party as 'ಕಾಂಗ್ರೆಸ್' (Congress), not an INC acronym.

AAP.note: Short transliterated form used in Kannada media; full name 'ಆಮ್ ಆದ್ಮಿ ಪಕ್ಷ' may be preferred on first mention — confirm house style.
